TMPL_001.name: Password Reset Template
TMPL_001.short_description: Password reset required for user account

KB_001.title: Password Reset Procedure
KB_001.short_description: Step-by-step guide for resetting user passwords
KB_001.body: This article provides instructions for IT staff to reset user passwords through Active Directory. Steps: 1. Open AD Users and Computers. 2. Locate the user account. 3. Right-click and select Reset Password. 4. Enter new temporary password. 5. Check "User must change password at next logon". 6. Click OK and notify user.

KB_002.title: Email Client Configuration Guide
KB_002.short_description: How to configure Outlook email client
KB_002.body: Complete guide for configuring Microsoft Outlook email client. Includes server settings, port configurations, SSL settings, and troubleshooting common connection issues. Recommended for Level 1 support staff.

KB_003.title: Desktop Boot Failure Troubleshooting
KB_003.short_description: Diagnostic steps for desktop boot issues
KB_003.body: Comprehensive troubleshooting guide for desktop computers that fail to boot. Covers: power supply checks, RAM diagnostics, display connection verification, BIOS settings, and hardware component testing. Use this for Level 2 hardware support.

KB_004.title: Email Account Recovery Steps
KB_004.short_description: Instructions for recovering locked email accounts
KB_004.body: This knowledge article describes the process for recovering and unlocking user email accounts. Steps include: verifying user identity, checking account status in admin console, unlocking the account, resetting password if needed, and testing access. Estimated resolution time: 15 minutes.

KB_005.title: Corporate Email Access Guide
KB_005.short_description: Common solutions for email access problems
KB_005.body: Troubleshooting guide for common email access issues including: authentication failures, network connectivity problems, client configuration errors, and server connection issues. Includes both self-service and agent-assisted solutions.
